name: Genshin Impact RPG (with Lorebooks)
description:
The World of Genshin Impact

🌸..+🍥..°.♡.°..🍥+..🌸

Thank you to @tooruthless for the base of the script (I added lots of tweaks!). Please check out their bot! 🩷

This bot is still being tested, so please tell me any issues below on character info and such (be kind). This is a work in progress. It's not going to be perfect and I'm perfecting it as I go since this is a LOT of info in the lorebooks.

I also recommend a proxy!

In this, I made multiple intros.🩷

intro one = list of intros

intro two = you are one of the twins, aka the traveler. fempov, Aether is your brother.

intro three = you are one of the twins, aka the traveler. malepov, Lumine is your sister.

intro four = you are the traveler... Without a sibling! You can pick why you're going through Tevyat.

intro five= you are a character from these world, free empty start!

intro six= fully empty start

intro seven= you're a third sibling to the twins! Aether is the traveler.

intro eight= you're a third sibling to the twins! Lumine is the traveler.

{For an Isekai version, please check out tooruthless's bot!}

° Please be kind of you have a negative review (have it be constructive criticism please!).

˚ʚ♡ɞ˚
